step_1.description: Reported count triangle developed to ultimate using latest 4 volume weighted average with 1.00 tail

step_2.description: Trend claim counts to 2008 with -1.5% trend for AY 2002-2006

step_3.description: Calculate on-level earned premiums using rate changes and cumulative rate factors

step_4.description: Calculate trended frequency to OLEP (per $1000) for AY 2002-2006

step_5.description: Select 2008 frequency level as average of AY 2005-2006

step_6.description: Calculate unadjusted frequencies for all AYs (per $1000)

step_7.description: Project ultimate claim counts using unadjusted frequencies and earned premiums

step_8.description: Develop severity to ultimate using latest 5 simple average with 1.01 tail

step_9.description: Adjust severities to 2008 level with 5% trend and tort reform factor for AY 1998-2006

step_10.description: Select 2008 severity as average of middle 3 from latest 5 adjusted severities

step_12.description: Calculate ultimate and IBNR for latest 2 AYs (2007-2008)
